name: Sekolah Terpadu Pahoa

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Ki Hajar Dewantara No.1, Gading Serpong, Tangerang, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Pahoa is one of the few schools in Greater Jakarta offering genuine Mandarin immersion - early years classes are conducted primarily in Mandarin.
paragraphs: Parents say Pahoa is one of the few schools in Greater Jakarta offering genuine Mandarin immersion - early years classes are conducted primarily in Mandarin.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$2.2K – US$6.2K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.

facilities: Green Building campus with natural ventilation
paragraphs: Facilities include: Green Building campus with natural ventilation, Rooftop garden, Science laboratories, Libraries, Sports facilities.
